description: Built strong analytical and problem-solving fundamentals through science-focused coursework, creating a solid base for technical studies.
Focused on software engineering fundamentals, application development, and practical implementation across collaborative academic projects.

Supported by MSIB (Magang dan Studi Independen Bersertifikat), a flagship Kampus Merdeka program from Kemendikbudristek that enables students to intern and gain industry experience with leading partners for one semester.
Contributed to software development tasks during internship, including feature implementation, debugging, and collaborative development workflow practices.
